visualization.description: Faceted scatterplot matrix showing pairwise relationships between soil nutrients (X-axes) and crop yield (Y-axes). Districts encoded by color, with interactive brushing across plots.

views.components: Row of dropdowns to select specific nutrients vs yield comparisons

effect.description: Brushed regions filter districts and nutrient/yield ranges

encodings: y2:Yield (quintals) using line mark with secondary axis
visualization.description: Grouped bar chart showing soil type frequency per district with overlaid yield line

effect.description: Selected soil types propagate to subsequent views

visualization.description: Horizontal box plots showing organic matter distribution across soil types
Parallel coordinates plot showing multi-parameter relationships for districts

outputs.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) to identify nutrient-yield correlations across districts through scatterplot matrix brushing. Selections automatically filter View 2 (Exploration) showing soil type productivity relationships. Clicking soil bars in View 2 updates View 3 (Exploration) with granular organic matter analysis. All filters propagate to View 4 (Insight) where parallel coordinates reveal complex soil-yield profiles.
